choice: Shaded percentile bands (P10/P25/P50/P75/P90) with the median line emphasized, not a spaghetti plot of all paths
rationale: This matches how ProjectionLab/BoldIn present probabilistic outcomes and is far more readable than overplotting thousands of paths. The engine already produces a distribution per year, so we render quantiles, not raw paths — also keeps the payload small (a few series of yearly percentiles vs. 10k×40 points). Probability-of-success (the headline number) is shown alongside as a stat, derived from the share of paths not depleting.
